title: poa poiretii
intro: Poa poiretii, also known as Poa pratensis subsp. poiretii, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa poiretii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Poa poiretii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal supplements due to its medicinal properties.
